tagline: Bookmark filter combinations: Dashboard authors can now save filter combinations as shared bookmarks, which viewers can quickly apply.
what_it_does: Bookmark filter combinations: Dashboard authors can now save filter combinations as shared bookmarks, which viewers can quickly apply. Pivot table column improvements: Pivot table columns can now expand and collapse. Theme customization enhancements: New theme customization options are now available, including the ability to change axis and grid line colors, adjust widget layout (margin, padding, corner radius, and shadow), and apply a color ramp.
why_it_matters: Pivot table column improvements: Pivot table columns can now expand and collapse.
plain_summary: Bookmark filter combinations: Dashboard authors can now save filter combinations as shared bookmarks, which viewers can quickly apply. Pivot table column improvements: Pivot table columns can now expand and collapse.
key_takeaway: Bookmark filter combinations: Dashboard authors can now save filter combinations as shared bookmarks, which viewers can quickly apply.
